creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm having some trouble building the port as a user due to the calls in files/pkg-install.in.

How about replacing most or all the code there with USERS/GROUPS (http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/users-and-groups.html)? Something similar to this commit: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=361002
